title: Apple plans five new iPhones through 2027, eyes Chinese-made chips amid foldable push, reports say
summary_full: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.
summary_public: Apple is planning five new iPhones by 2027 and is considering Chinese memory suppliers as it expands foldable production, reports say.
